title: Session Events, Atomic Checkpoints, Idempotent Resume, Fork, and Replay · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: An internal service desk and accountable change manager. They need read-only diagnosis, a least-privilege reversible change tool, immutable action preview, explicit approval, crash-safe pause and resume, idempotent effects, cancellation, replay, and complete audit evidence. Planned artifact: Deliver Approval-Bound Service Operations Assistant with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-c…
objectives: Classify pure reads, sensitive reads, reversible writes, irreversible writes, external communication, financial, identity, and security effects.
Enforce steps, wall time, tokens, model calls, tool calls, retries, bytes, concurrency, and spend before each transition.
Bind approval to user, session, policy, tool version, normalized arguments digest, preview digest, expiry, and one execution nonce.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Fork Replay Simulation
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-fork-replay-simulation-eqnuhw" that uses case 5119 to persist append-only session events and atomic checkpoints that support idempotent resume, fork, replay, and effect reconciliation. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

For Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Fork Replay Simulation, keep Fork Replay Simulation connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-fork-replay-simulation-eqnuhw
# Competency: agentpy-fork-replay-simulation.
# Case 5119: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments.
# Changed case: inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects.
def evidence_agentpy_fork_replay_simulation_eqnuhw(events: int = 36, persisted_events: int = 36, checkpoints: int = 6, replayed_checkpoints: int = 6, duplicate_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_eqnuhw = "eqnuhw-whunqe-5119"
    assert evidence_variant_eqnuhw
    evidence_axes_eqnuhw = (
        "authorityeqnuhw",
        "interaction5119",
        "toolwhunqe",
        "stateeqnuhw5119",
        "evaluation5119eqnuhw",
        "recoverywhunqe5119",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_eqnuhw)) == 6
    if events < 1 or persisted_events < 0:
        return False, persisted_events, "session-event-count"
    if persisted_events != events:
        return False, persisted_events, "event-loss"
    if checkpoints < 2 or replayed_checkpoints != checkpoints:
        return False, replayed_checkpoints, "checkpoint-replay"
    if duplicate_effects > 0:
        return False, duplicate_effects, "replay-effect-duplication"
    assert persisted_events == events and replayed_checkpoints == checkpoints and duplicate_effects == 0
    return True, replayed_checkpoints, "replayable-agent-session"
